texto: True love occurs when a couple are matches, not mates. It is easier for mates to part when their season is over, as most animals do, while matches will correspond spiritually, mentally, physically, and socially, thus cleaving to one another and resisting separation.
explicacao: Citação de Isaac Milioti sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “True love occurs when a couple are matches, not mates. It is easier for mates to part when their …” articula amor, romance-novels, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
